metadata.name: Mobi Golden Set v1 - Real Public Bid PDFs
metadata.notes: First real Golden Set corpus: three public/authorized project-manual PDFs from official public agency/university/government sites. V1 measures the current automatic trade-census/generic-scope extraction lanes, not final takeoff accuracy. Expected trades use current engine trade codes verified by hand against the public project-manual scope: architectural_general, concrete, and finishes. Numeric drawing/takeoff quantities are not included because these project-manual PDFs do not provide a clean, source-measured quantity schedule.

ground_truth_scope_notes: Source text identifies the project as Longstreet Theatre Exterior Restoration issued for bidding.
Table of contents includes Division 03 / 033000 Cast-In-Place Concrete.
Source text includes painting scope such as painting disturbed areas and Division 09 painting/coatings content.
No complete addenda set or source-measured quantity schedule was collected for v1; benchmark calibration is ineligible.

Golden Set v1 maps painting/coatings scope to the current engine generic `finishes` lane and cast-in-place concrete scope to the `concrete` lane; dedicated painting/demo_concrete extraction provider outputs are not the scoring target for this real-corpus run.
key_exclusions: No quantity takeoff ground truth asserted in v1
No customer-facing estimate or pricing use
key_inclusions: Civil work associated with underground drainage/downspouts
projects.quantity_notes: No clean measured project quantity schedule found in the public project manual during v1 hand review; key_quantities intentionally omitted until drawings/takeoff ground truth are added.
projects.title: Longstreet Theatre Exterior Restoration - Project Manual

projects.agency: California Department of General Services / California Highway Patrol
ground_truth_scope_notes: Source title page identifies San Gorgonio Pass Perimeter Fence for California Highway Patrol.
Table of contents includes Division 03 Concrete Reinforcing and 033000 Cast-In-Place Concrete.
Source text includes painting requirements for temporary wood fences, barricades, walkways, and painting environmental conditions.
No complete addenda set or source-measured quantity schedule was collected for v1; benchmark calibration is ineligible.

Golden Set v1 maps painting/coatings scope to the current engine generic `finishes` lane and cast-in-place concrete scope to the `concrete` lane; dedicated painting/demo_concrete extraction provider outputs are not the scoring target for this real-corpus run.
key_exclusions: No quantity takeoff ground truth asserted in v1
No customer-facing estimate or pricing use
key_inclusions: Concrete reinforcing and cast-in-place concrete specifications
projects.location: 195 Highland Springs Avenue, Beaumont, Riverside County, California

projects.agency: City of Norman Parks & Recreation Department
ground_truth_scope_notes: Source cover identifies City of Norman Parks & Recreation Ruby Grant Park sealed bid specifications and contract documents, Amendment One.
Table of contents includes 033000 Cast-in-Place Concrete.
Table of contents includes 099000 Painting and 099713 Exterior Steel Coatings.
Geotechnical/report text includes slab on grade terminology; no complete drawing takeoff was hand-measured in v1.

Golden Set v1 maps painting/coatings scope to the current engine generic `finishes` lane and cast-in-place concrete scope to the `concrete` lane; dedicated painting/demo_concrete extraction provider outputs are not the scoring target for this real-corpus run.

No customer-facing estimate or pricing use
